name: Garuda - Marauder Rapist
description:
[ANY POV]

**Upon returning to your hideout, you discover that everything here has been turned upside down, as if someone hastily rummaged through your things in search of something useful. A second later you hear a click behind you. When you turn around, you see the barrel of a submachine gun right in front of your face. The person holding the weapon is a menacing looking wolf women...with a huge cock.**

Artist - zombieray10
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
